title: AI Traffic Workshop Slides
description: Full slide deck used in student workshops covering AI basics, traffic signals, and the simulation.

title: Fixed Timer vs AI Signal Activity Sheet
description: Printable worksheet where students record observations while running the simulation modes.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning Lesson Plan
description: A 45-minute lesson plan introducing ML concepts with hands-on examples for K-8 teachers.

title: Cybersecurity Basics Handout
description: Student-friendly guide covering passwords, phishing, and data privacy essentials.

title: STEM Careers in AI & Transportation
description: Career exploration guide featuring 15 STEM professions, salary ranges, and education pathways.

title: Smart City Vocabulary Flashcards
description: Interactive flashcards with key terms in AI, sensors, cybersecurity, smart cities, and urban technology.

title: AI Ethics Discussion Guide
description: Facilitated discussion prompts on fairness, bias, and responsible AI for high school classrooms.

title: Parent & Community Info Sheet
description: One-page overview of the Gold Award project for parents and community members.

title: AI Scavenger Hunt
description: A take-home family activity where students find examples of AI in everyday life, from voice assistants to navigation apps.

title: Cybersecurity Escape Room Challenge
description: A team-based cybersecurity puzzle where students decode messages, spot phishing, rank passwords, and unlock a final code.

title: Build a Traffic Light Craft
description: A hands-on paper traffic light craft and partner game that teaches signal logic and how AI chooses which road gets green.

title: Build Your Own Algorithm
description: An interactive IF/THEN traffic-light game where students design their own signal algorithm and compare it to fixed timer, sensor-based, and AI adaptive modes.

title: Certificates & Badges
description: A student certificate generator and badge tracker for completing the AI, cybersecurity, and traffic simulation learning tracks.
